purpose: Registers manual Owner+Logos execution corridor as a first-class candidate pipeline without overclaiming automation.
required_questions: What is the source of truth for this claim?
What cap applies if evidence is missing?
What would make this claim fake-green?
pass_criteria: All criteria include owner value, evidence, and PASS/WARN/BLOCK logic.
Current status is explicit per criterion.
No real-use execution claim is made without required evidence.
warn_criteria: Some criteria are still UNKNOWN but improvement hooks exist.
Pilot is preflight-ready only with warnings/caps.
block_criteria: Matrix claims active production capability without evidence.
next_action: Use this matrix in next preflight/pilot closure loop and update criterion statuses with receipts.

criteria.plain_language_meaning: Manual pipeline stages are explicitly recorded.
criteria.owner_value: Chat-based work remains traceable and reusable.
criteria.pass_logic: Record includes idea, Logos interpretation, taskpack, commit, reviews, and next pipeline decision.
criteria.warn_logic: Record exists but some links are pending.
criteria.next_improvement_hook: Create machine schema + checker for manual corridor records.

criteria.plain_language_meaning: Manual pipeline is not overclaimed as automation.
criteria.pass_logic: All statements keep manual steps explicit.
criteria.next_improvement_hook: Add explicit anti-overclaim checklist in pipeline template.
